# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

- Related issue:
- Related task:

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation

- [ ] Test

## Testing Completed

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing

## Security Considerations

- [ ] Tenant or company isolation reviewed
- [ ] Authentication or authorization impact reviewed
- [ ] Sensitive data handling reviewed
- [ ] Logging reviewed for secrets or private data

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and scoped.
- [ ] Code follows project naming and architecture conventions.
- [ ] API responses use standardized response formats where applicable.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] Tests are added or updated where needed.
- [ ] Existing tests pass locally or the reason they were not run is documented.
